title: Restrict property tests to release branches only

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--restrict-proptests
comments.content: Plan: Add if condition to proptest job to only run on release/** branches or PRs targeting main. Single line change at line 131-134 in .github/workflows/ci.yml. The test job's smoke proptests (PROPTEST_CASES=10) remain unchanged.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--restrict-proptests
comments.content: Decision: Added 'if' condition to proptest job at line 135. Runs only on release/** pushes or PRs targeting main. This gates expensive 1000-case proptests to release gates while the test job's 10-case smoke run continues on all branches.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--restrict-proptests
comments.content: Result: Added if condition to proptest job in ci.yml. Extended 1000-case proptests now gate only on release/** pushes and PRs to main. Smoke 10-case proptests in the test job remain unchanged on all branches. YAML validated, only proptest job affected.
